items.title: Zimbabwe's Surprise Lithium Ban Scrambles Global Battery Supply Chains
items.description: Zimbabwe's Surprise Lithium Ban Scrambles Global Battery Supply Chains  Crude Oil Prices Today | OilPrice.com
summary_3_sentences: Zimbabwe has unexpectedly banned the export of raw lithium.
This ban is expected to disrupt global battery supply chains, which rely heavily on lithium.
The move could lead to increased prices and scarcity of lithium for battery manufacturers worldwide.

items.title: QuantumScape Battery Tech: 2025 Production Milestones & Market Expansion - News and Statistics
items.description: QuantumScape Battery Tech: 2025 Production Milestones & Market Expansion - News and Statistics  IndexBox
summary_3_sentences: QuantumScape is working towards its 2025 production milestones for its battery technology.
The company is also focusing on market expansion for its innovative battery solutions.
These efforts are crucial for QuantumScape's growth in the competitive battery market.

items.title: First premium electric SUV with mass solid-state battery and hypercar acceleration unveiled by vacuum maker Dreame
items.description: First premium electric SUV with mass solid-state battery and hypercar acceleration unveiled by vacuum maker Dreame  Notebookcheck
summary_3_sentences: Dreame, a vacuum maker, has unveiled the first premium electric SUV featuring a mass-produced solid-state battery.
This SUV boasts hypercar-level acceleration, showcasing the potential of the new battery technology.
The launch marks a significant step in bringing advanced battery technology to the consumer vehicle market.

items.title: 포스코퓨처엠, 음극재 사업 진출 이후 가장 큰 규모 '인조흑연 음극재'...
items.description: 이번 공급계약은 2011년 음극재 사업 진출 이후 가장 큰 규모로, 공장이 자리한 경북 포항의 2차전지... 현재 포스코퓨처엠은 국내 배터리사와 GM 등에 음극재를 공급하고 있다. 또 2025년 7월에는 일본 메이저 배터리사...
summary_3_sentences: POSCO Future M has secured its largest-ever order for artificial graphite anode material since entering the anode business in 2011.
This significant supply contract will be fulfilled starting in July 2025, with deliveries to a major Japanese battery manufacturer.
POSCO Future M currently supplies anode materials to domestic battery companies and GM, further solidifying its position in the battery supply chain.

items.title: EV 밀고 피지컬 AI 끈다...삼성SDI, 성장 동력 찾기 '사활'
items.description: 이 자리에서 그는 내년 전고체 배터리 양산 의지를 재확인하며 차세대 성장 동력 확보에 강한 드라이브를 걸었다. 배터리 밸류체인 협력 강화 행보도 이어졌다. 최 사장은 같은 날 에코프로 전시관을 방문해 전고체...
summary_3_sentences: Samsung SDI is prioritizing the development of solid-state batteries as a next-generation growth engine, reaffirming its mass production goals for 2025.
The company is also strengthening its collaborations across the battery value chain.
Samsung SDI's focus on solid-state batteries and partnerships highlights its strategy to secure future competitiveness in the evolving energy market.

items.title: 에코프로, 전고체 배터리 '승부수' 던졌다…인터배터리서 글로벌 고객 ...
items.description: 에코프로가 전고체 배터리 소재 개발 로드맵을 공개한 ‘인터배터리 2026’ 전시가 성황리에 마쳤다고 15일 밝혔다. 에코프로는 자동차 OEM(주문제조의뢰), 배터리 셀 제조사 등 잠재 고객들과 개별 미팅을 진행해 다양한...
summary_3_sentences: EcoPro announced the successful conclusion of its participation in 'InterBattery 2026', where it unveiled its roadmap for solid-state battery material development.
The company engaged in individual meetings with potential customers, including automotive OEMs and battery cell manufacturers, to discuss various business opportunities.
EcoPro's proactive engagement at the exhibition underscores its commitment to leading the next-generation energy market.

items.title: 삼성SDI, 美 에너지 업체와 ESS 배터리 1.5조 공급 계약 체결
items.description: 한편 삼성SDI는 '인터배터리 2026' 부대행사인 '더배터리컨퍼런스(TBC)'에서 전고체 배터리가 향후 휴머노이드 로봇 시장에서 활용될 차세대 배터리 기술이라고 소개했다. 회사는 지난해 약 50만대 수준이던 글로벌...
summary_3_sentences: Samsung SDI has signed a 1.5 trillion KRW supply contract with a US energy company for Energy Storage System (ESS) batteries.
At 'The Battery Conference (TBC)', an event associated with 'InterBattery 2026', Samsung SDI highlighted solid-state batteries as a next-generation technology for the future humanoid robot market.
This contract and strategic positioning demonstrate Samsung SDI's efforts to expand its market presence in both ESS and emerging robot applications.

items.title: [더벨][인터배터리 2026] 삼성SDI, 전고체 배터리 들고 피지컬 AI 심장 노...
items.description: 삼성SDI가 휴머노이드 로봇에 탑재될 전고체 배터리 양산 준비에 속도를 내며 미래 로봇 시장 선점에 나섰다. 전기차와 에너지저장장치(ESS) 시장을 넘어, 인공지능(AI)과 결합한 로봇 배터리 분야를 차기 성장 동력으로...
summary_3_sentences: Samsung SDI is accelerating its preparations for the mass production of solid-state batteries intended for humanoid robots, aiming to secure a leading position in the future robot market.
The company is targeting the robot battery sector, driven by AI integration, as its next growth engine beyond electric vehicles and ESS markets.
This strategic focus indicates Samsung SDI's ambition to diversify its business and capitalize on emerging technological trends.

items.title: 에코프로, 전고체 배터리 소재 상용화 로드맵 공개
items.description: 에코프로가 '인터배터리(INTERBATTERY) 2026' 전시회를 통해 전고체 배터리 소재 개발 로드맵을 공개하며 차세대 에너지 시장 선업에 나섰다. 3월 11일부터 13일까지 사흘간 진행된 이번 행사에서 에코프로는 현대자동차...
summary_3_sentences: EcoPro has unveiled its development roadmap for solid-state battery materials at the 'InterBattery 2026' exhibition, signaling its entry into the next-generation energy market.
The exhibition, held from March 11th to 13th, provided a platform for EcoPro to showcase its technological advancements.
EcoPro's initiative demonstrates its commitment to innovation and leadership in the rapidly evolving battery industry.

items.title: 에코프로, 전고체 소재 전략 공개…완성차·셀업계 주목
items.description: 에코프로가 인터배터리 2026에서 전고체 배터리 소재 개발 로드맵을 공개하고 글로벌 고객사와 사업 협력을 논의했다. 에코프로는 지난 11~13일 서울 코엑스에서 열린 인터배터리 전시 기간 동안 약 3만명이 부스를...
summary_3_sentences: EcoPro presented its strategic roadmap for solid-state battery materials at InterBattery 2026 and discussed business collaborations with global customers.
During the exhibition, which took place from March 11th to 13th at COEX, Seoul, EcoPro's booth attracted approximately 30,000 visitors.
The company's engagement highlights the significant industry interest in its solid-state battery material advancements.

items.title: Oregon law would require battery manufacturers to create statewide battery recycling program
items.description: Oregon law would require battery manufacturers to create statewide battery recycling program  NPR for Oregonians
summary_3_sentences: A new law proposed in Oregon would mandate battery manufacturers to establish a statewide battery recycling program.
This initiative aims to address the growing environmental concerns associated with battery waste.
The proposed legislation reflects a broader trend towards increased producer responsibility in managing end-of-life products.

items.title: Lyten Expands European Battery Hub With Revolt Recycling Plant Acquisition
items.description: Lyten Expands European Battery Hub With Revolt Recycling Plant Acquisition  Electric Cars Report
summary_3_sentences: Lyten has expanded its European battery hub by acquiring the Revolt Recycling plant.
This acquisition is part of Lyten's strategy to enhance its battery manufacturing and recycling capabilities in Europe.
The move signifies Lyten's commitment to strengthening its presence and operations within the European battery market.

items.title: Lithium-ion battery blazes imperil fragile supply chains, warns Los Angeles port chief
items.description: Lithium-ion battery blazes imperil fragile supply chains, warns Los Angeles port chief  Financial Times
summary_3_sentences: The chief of the Port of Los Angeles has warned that lithium-ion battery fires pose a significant threat to fragile supply chains.
These fires can cause disruptions and damage, impacting the flow of goods and materials.
The warning underscores the need for enhanced safety measures and protocols in handling and transporting lithium-ion batteries.

items.title: Nevada congresswoman pushes new bills to tackle lithium battery fires
items.description: Nevada congresswoman pushes new bills to tackle lithium battery fires  KSNV
summary_3_sentences: A congresswoman from Nevada is introducing new legislative bills aimed at addressing and mitigating lithium battery fires.
These proposed laws seek to implement measures to prevent and manage the risks associated with battery fires.
The initiative reflects growing concerns about battery safety and the need for regulatory action.

items.title: China Carbon Neutral Development Group Forms Strategic Alliance to Expand Lithium Battery Recycling and New Energy Ecosystem
items.description: China Carbon Neutral Development Group Forms Strategic Alliance to Expand Lithium Battery Recycling and New Energy Ecosystem  TipRanks
summary_3_sentences: China Carbon Neutral Development Group has formed a strategic alliance to expand its lithium battery recycling and new energy ecosystem.
This collaboration aims to enhance the company's capabilities in sustainable energy solutions.
The alliance signifies a commitment to advancing the circular economy within the battery and new energy sectors in China.

items.title: China's top EV expert Ouyang Minggao: solid-state batteries need years to mature, current technology already good
items.description: China's top EV expert Ouyang Minggao: solid-state batteries need years to mature, current technology already good  CarNewsChina.com
summary_3_sentences: Ouyang Minggao, a leading Chinese expert in electric vehicles, stated that solid-state batteries require several more years to mature.
He believes that current battery technologies are already performing well.
This perspective suggests a cautious outlook on the immediate widespread adoption of solid-state batteries, emphasizing the continued relevance of existing technologies.

items.title: Japanese Flexible Magnesium Air Battery University of Tsukuba Researchers Solid State Technology Innovation
items.description: Japanese Flexible Magnesium Air Battery University of Tsukuba Researchers Solid State Technology Innovation  Technetbook
summary_3_sentences: Researchers at the University of Tsukuba in Japan have developed innovative flexible magnesium-air battery technology.
This advancement in solid-state technology could lead to new possibilities for energy storage.
The development highlights Japan's ongoing contributions to battery research and innovation.
